properties.name: ai.provider
properties.description: Selects which AIProvider implementation Spring instantiates (e.g. 'gemini').

properties.name: ai.model
properties.description: Model id used by the AIProvider (e.g. gemini-2.5-pro / gemini-2.5-flash).

properties.name: ai.gemini.api-key
properties.description: Google Gemini API key; required when ai.provider=gemini.

properties.name: agent-service.base-url
properties.description: Base URL the backend uses to reach the Python agent service.

properties.name: agent-service.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: Connect timeout (ms) for the agent-service WebClient.

properties.name: agent-service.read-timeout-ms
properties.description: Read/response timeout (ms) for the agent-service WebClient.

properties.name: security.jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC signing secret for JWT access tokens; must be >= 32 chars.

properties.name: security.jwt.access-token-ttl-minutes
properties.description: Access token time-to-live in minutes.

properties.name: security.jwt.refresh-token-ttl-days
properties.description: Refresh token time-to-live in days.

properties.name: security.rate-limit.auth-per-minute
properties.description: Configured auth-endpoint rate limit per minute (not yet enforced).

properties.name: security.rate-limit.api-per-minute
properties.description: Configured API rate limit per minute (not yet enforced).

properties.name: security.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of exact allowed CORS origins (no wildcards).

properties.name: storage.s3.endpoint
properties.description: S3/MinIO endpoint URL.

properties.name: storage.s3.region
properties.description: S3 region.

properties.name: storage.s3.bucket
properties.description: S3 bucket name for object storage.

properties.name: storage.s3.access-key
properties.description: S3/MinIO access key.

properties.name: storage.s3.secret-key
properties.description: S3/MinIO secret key.

properties.name: storage.s3.path-style
properties.description: Use path-style access (required by MinIO).

properties.name: kafka.topics.workflow-events
properties.description: Topic name for workflow state-change events.

properties.name: kafka.topics.audit-events
properties.description: Topic name for audit events (declared but not yet produced/consumed).
